title: VICE - QoL Compendium
description: A resource pack compendium that consists of small quality of life tweaks mainly to the user's HUD.
body:
#

VICE - QoL Compendium

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available_for-1.18--latest-blue) ![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod_Loader-any-orange) VICE is a resource pack compendium that consists of small quality of life tweaks mainly to the user's HUD. Most of its features are derived from vanilla tweaks. ## ### Toggleable Features - Crosshair Variants - Circular Sun & Moon - Clearer Withered Hearts - Colored Ping Indicator - Consistent White Outlines - Lowered Fire in First Person - Lowered Shield in First Person - Scaffolding Retexture - Consistent Bottle o' Enchanting ## ### Toggling Features On/Off Starting from 1.1 this resourcepack utilises [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) for users to toggle features on their own accord. ## ### External Credits - [Boss Crosshairs by xSpinHDx](https://modrinth.com/user/xSpinHDx) - [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) - [Low Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-fire-pack) (1.0 and earlier)
